title: Keadic 60 Pcs 4 Colors Heart Round Shape Metal Split Key Ring Assorted Set with Lobster Claw Clasp, Keychain Clip Lanyard Pendant Key Chain Supplies for Keyring Leather Craft Jewelry Making
features: 【What You Get】You will get 60pcs key ring making findings in 4 colors: gold, silver pink, gun black, including 20pcs heart shaped split key rings, 20pcs lobster claw clasp and 20 pcs round keyring. Many colors and enough quantities, which are very suitable for all kinds of handmade.

【Quality Material &Exquisite Shape】 Our keychian making accessories are made of high quality stainless steel with electroplating plated treatment for keeping shiny surface and rust resistance, which are hard to fade. The design is super cute heart shape, which means the full of love that will melt your heart. The smooth and burr-free surface will not scratch your hands. Make your charms look even more magical and elegant.

【Easy to Use】 The split keyring is easy to install and disassemble. Split and flat design will hold multiple keys securely, so that small items will not be lost. The lobster clasp with 360 degree rotation for convenient application that you can adjust the direction arbitrarily that you just need to pull and hold trigger to open.

【Multi Function】Perfect for hanging photos, drapes, curtains and many other household uses, these swivel clips are also great for making lanyards, key chains, anniversary photo keychains, zipper pulls, handbags, purses, shoulder straps, backpacks, handmade dog collars, luggage belt etc. These keychain hooks open up endless creative possibilities.

【Perfect and Sweet Gift】These swivel keychains claps are a perfect addition to the gifts you made. You can give the heart shaped lobster clasp as a gift to your family, friends, colleagues or classmates. They will be happy to receive it. It is an ideal gift for Mother's Day, birthdays, Christmas, Thanksgiving, anniversaries etc.
